response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership via open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack spanning mobile, web, and systems programming with strong testing focus
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership beyond technical mentorship
Limited demonstrated experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) as required
No mention of roadmap planning, organizational change, or cross-team alignment at scale
